subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that the Point of the Bayán is His servant and His Glory. This is that which was sent down concerning the prior Manifestation Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان نقطه البیان عبده و بهائه هذا ما نزل علی ظهور قبلی الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @blind imitation [taqlid]
